creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
Guido, 

You are too kind and your diligence is appreciated. This looks great and
runs just fine on my 9.3 installation. My 10 virtualbox image was too
small so I am starting over on that one. 

This update is approved so please go ahead and commit, pending apsw of
course. 

Much appreciated!
Rusty Nejdl 

On 2013-09-11 17:06, Guido Falsi wrote: 

> Hi,
> 
> I have made a few small changes:
> 
> - py-apsw is reallly needed at run time, so I moved it to RUN_DEPENDS
> 
> - I changed files/patch-setup_install.py. That script had a 'gcc' string 
> hardcoded in. In latest head there isn't any gcc command installed by 
> default. I modified the code to use the CC environment variable and 
> fallback to 'gcc' if such variable isn't defined. I think this patch 
> should be submitted upstream.
> 
> - I also removed the change from #!/usr/bin/env python2 to 
> #!/usr/bin/env python2.7, we do have a python2 command now and 
> hardcoding 2.7 would prevent the port from working with other python 
> versions.
> 
> Reviewed patch attached.
> 
> Can you approve the changes?
> 
> Thanks in advance!
